'''yangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xenoplastically|xenoplastically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xenoplastically|xenoplastically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yangate|yangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yangatesher|yangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yangatesherĂ«m|yangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yangatero|yangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yangateshĂ«|yangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yangateshĂ«m|yangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyangatero|gokiyangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyangateshĂ«|gokiyangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyangateshĂ«m|gokiyangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyangankerom|goyangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyangankeshĂ«|goyangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyangankeshĂ«m|goyangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyangankeya|goyangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yangaterom|yangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yangatemu|yangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yangateya|yangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyangaterom|gokiyangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyangatemu|gokiyangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyangateya|gokiyangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yangangate|yangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yangangatesher|yangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yangangatesherĂ«m|yangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yangangatero|yangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yangangateshĂ«|yangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yangangateshĂ«m|yangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyangangatero|gokiyangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyangangateshĂ«|gokiyangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyangangateshĂ«m|gokiyangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyangangankerom|goyangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyangangankeshĂ«|goyangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyangangankeshĂ«m|goyangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyangangankeya|goyangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yangangaterom|yangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yangangatemu|yangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yangangateya|yangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyangangaterom|gokiyangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyangangatemu|gokiyangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyangangateya|gokiyangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠngĂŠte|yĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠngĂŠtesher|yĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠngĂŠtero|yĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠngĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠngĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠngĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠngĂŠterom|yĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠngĂŠtemu|yĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠngĂŠteya|yĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠngĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠngĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafngafte|yafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafngaftesher|yafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafngaftesherĂ«m|yafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafngaftero|yafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafngafteshĂ«|yafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafngafteshĂ«m|yafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafngaftero|gokiyafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafngafteshĂ«|gokiyafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafngafteshĂ«m|gokiyafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafngafnkerom|goyafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafngafnkeshĂ«|goyafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafngafnkeshĂ«m|goyafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafngafnkeya|goyafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafngafterom|yafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafngaftemu|yafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafngafteya|yafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafngafterom|gokiyafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafngaftemu|gokiyafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafngafteya|gokiyafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
